title: India's Energy R&D Landscape: A Critical Assessment
summary: Energy research and development has received little attention in the flurry of energy policy shifts and reforms over the past decade, continuing with a historical trend where government attention on ER&D policy has been, at best, sporadic.
body: Energy research and development has received little attention in the flurry of energy policy shifts and reforms over the past decade, continuing with a historical trend where government attention on ER&D policy has been, at best, sporadic.
